reach_why: Extends familiar critique of evaluation pipelines, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links leakage, hard-to-vary criteria, and opaque premises as one interpretive failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via benchmark interventions, but core claims depend on contested interpretive judgments.
explanation: Benchmark success cannot prove knowledge creation when leakage and human-dependent interpretation remain unresolved.
